niche: Boutique wellness studio and recovery services
targetAudience: Busy professionals and active adults who want premium local wellness support with a calm, trustworthy brand
offer: Membership-based recovery sessions, infrared sauna, and mobility support
goals: Increase studio visits, strengthen local awareness, and make recurring services easier to understand and book
keyThemes: Service experience, customer wins, wellness education, community relevance, offer clarity
extraContext: Business is location-based and thrives on repeat visits, referrals, and stronger understanding of service benefits.
